product_issue_mappings: Credit reporting or other personal consumer reports / Problem with a company's investigation into an existing problem

mechanism_definition.operational_step: Dispute intake, investigation, evidence routing, and response.
mechanism_definition.failure_mode: Alleged failure to correct, investigate, match evidence, communicate status, or resolve disputed information.
mechanism_definition.consumer_consequence: Consumer reports continued unresolved or allegedly inaccurate information.
mechanism_definition.expected_process: Receive dispute, assess evidence, investigate, communicate outcome, and update/report resolution.
mechanism_definition.observed_alleged_deviation: CFPB complaint narratives allege the process did not resolve the disputed credit report issue.
mechanism_definition.repeat_pattern: Observed in 1 CFPB record(s) across 1 company reference(s).
mechanism_definition.software_addressability_hypothesis: A reusable dispute orchestration, evidence collection, deadline tracking, and audit trail component may address parts of the workflow.
mechanism_definition.required_corroboration: Independent regulatory, enforcement, judicial, audit, company, or examination evidence showing the same mechanism.

alternative_explanations: Similar CFPB complaints may reflect reporting behaviour or company size rather than a shared root cause.
Consumer allegations may be incomplete, inaccurate, or unresolved in the public record.
The same taxonomy may group operationally different cases.
source_limitations: CFPB complaint repetition does not prove operational failure.
CFPB consumer narratives are not independently verified.
CFPB records do not establish market prevalence.

opportunities.workflow_owner: unknown; likely disputes, compliance, servicing, or customer operations
opportunities.regulatory_exposure: possible but unverified from CFPB complaints alone
opportunities.non_software_alternatives: process change, policy change, staffing, vendor tools, or training may address the mechanism
reasoning_chain: Assessed finding FND-41082193697B after finding generation.
Mapped mechanism incorrect_credit_report_information to component hypothesis: Credit report correction evidence workflow.
Opportunity assessment does not override missing evidence.

source_reliability.update_frequency: Published by CFPB; update cadence should be confirmed per access method.
source_reliability.coverage_period: Depends on retrieved official dataset or query result.
known_limitations: Consumer narratives are not independently verified.
Complaint volume alone does not prove operational failure.
The dataset is not statistically representative of the full market.
Complaint volume may reflect company size, consumer awareness, reporting behaviour, or market share.
Similar complaints do not automatically prove a common root cause.
Company response status does not independently validate every consumer allegation.
Records may contain missing or withheld fields.
Public narratives may be unavailable for some records.
verification_constraints: CFPB complaint repetition can support a repeated complaint signal.
CFPB alone cannot independently corroborate the underlying allegation.
CFPB alone cannot establish a BUILD CANDIDATE verdict.
Independent source evidence is required for stronger commercial conclusions.
independence_constraints: Multiple CFPB complaints count as one source family.
Different CFPB distribution methods do not create source-family independence.
CFPB complaint records do not independently verify consumer allegations.
source_reliability.representativeness_warning: CFPB complaint records are not a statistically representative market sample.
source_reliability.data_completeness_warning: Some CFPB fields may be missing, withheld, amended, or unavailable in public data.
permitted_uses: Analyse repeated CFPB complaint signals across companies.
Generate CFPB-limited findings requiring independent corroboration.
prohibited_inferences: Do not infer that alleged failures definitely occurred.
Do not infer market prevalence from complaint volume alone.
Do not infer that software is the best intervention.
Do not produce BUILD CANDIDATE from CFPB data alone.
